top_signals.title: Mamoon Hamid on the Importance of Identifying Potential
top_signals.summary: Barry sits down with Kleiner Perkins Partner, Mamoon Hamid. They discuss Mamoon's thoughts on the AI revolution and his approach to early AI investing.  Mamoon also breaks down how he became an early investor in giants like Slack, Figma, and how Kleiner Perkins assesses the investments they missed.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: British Columbia mining hampered by DRIPA ‘confusion’
top_signals.summary: In June, BC’s Supreme Court lifted an injunction that had temporarily restricted construction activities pending resolution of a judicial review.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hudbay gains Peru approval to further increase Constancia mill throughput
top_signals.summary: The new permit increases the Constancia mill's processing capacity from 31 million tonnes per annum (mtpa) to 34 mtpa.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Boliden in talks to buy Votorantim’s controlling stake in Nexa
top_signals.summary: Nexa is one of the world's leading zinc producers.
